description: A square graphic on a light blue background with a faint agency-seal watermark. Dark blue text in the upper portion reads Green cards are for those who follow the law, not those who break it, with the second clause in bold. A specimen United States Permanent Resident card is shown angled in the lower portion, with sample placeholder fields and a photo.
notable_text: Green cards are for those who follow the law, not those who break it; UNITED STATES OF AMERICA PERMANENT RESIDENT
